features: PREMIUM FOOD GRADE QUALITY – Made from high-quality, crystal-clear food-grade cellophane, WRAPYARD’s wrapping roll ensures a polished, professional look for every gift. Whether you’re wrapping flower bouquets, gift baskets, or packaging cookies and candies, this transparent cellophane wrap adds a luxurious touch while keeping contents fresh, clean, and beautifully presented. Ideal for birthdays, weddings, holidays, and everyday gifting.

PERFECT SIZE FOR MULTI-PURPOSE WRAPPING – WRAPYARD’s clear cellophane wrap roll measures 40cm wide and 15 meters long when unrolled, making it ideal for professional gift wrapping, floral arrangements, hamper baskets, cookie packaging, candy wrapping, party favors, and DIY crafts. This florist-grade transparent wrap adds a clean, premium touch to any bouquet, gift, or presentation.

EXTRA THICK & TEAR RESISTANT – Crafted with 2.5 mil thickness, WRAPYARD’s clear cellophane wrap offers superior durability and strength. This heavy-duty gift wrap roll resists rips, tears, and punctures, making it perfect for securely wrapping gift baskets, party favors, baked goods, toys, and floral arrangements. Ideal for both professional and home use.

QUICK & CONVENIENT WRAPPING – WRAPYARD’s cellophane wrap roll is simple to use just unroll, cut to size, and wrap! This user friendly design makes it ideal for fast, efficient gift wrapping, especially during holidays or events. Perfect for hampers, gift baskets, treats, and crafts, helping you get more done in less time with a clean, professional finish.

VERSATILE FOR ALL OCCASIONS – This clear cellophane wrap is perfect for a wide range of uses! Ideal for wrapping gift hampers, flower bouquets, gift boxes, homemade soaps, baked goods, candy, picture frames, arts & crafts, party favors, and toys. Whether it's for birthdays, weddings, holidays, or business packaging, WRAPYARD’s cellophane adds a polished, professional touch to any item.
description: Product Description MAKE AND GIFT PROFESSIONAL-QUALITY HAMPERS AND BOUQUETS The crystal clear cellophane wrap by WRAPYARD is the perfect tool for taking your wrapping game to another level. The high-quality material of the wrap helps give a polished look to any wrapped present or item, helping elevate it from a decently wrapped present to a fairly good one. 2.5 MIL THICKNESS With the thickened, dust-proof, and crystal clear appearance, they are durable enough for styling gift hampers and bouquets of any size. In addition, the thickness allows you to maneuver the wrap more freely without worrying about causing any tears or rips. Cellophane Wrap Crystal clear finish for a professional look. Easy to cut and shape. Ideal for holidays, weddings, birthdays, and packaging . Clear Cellophane Wrap Crystal clear cellophane wrap, food safe and strong , perfect for gifts, treats, and crafts. Ideal for gift wrapping, treat packaging, floral arrangements, crafts, and party favors. Wrap Hamper Baskets Make extravagant hampers of any size, big or small, with ease. Wrap Gifts Present elegantly wrapped presents to your family and loved ones Cellophane wrap Gifts Packaging The clear cellophane wrap roll offers outstanding Wrapping, allowing the stuff inside to be display beautifully. Wrap Cookies Wrap cookies and other delectable foods to keep them fresh. Convenient to Use The highly transparent and shiny wrap is very easy to use. It’s the perfect wrap for any holiday or occasion. To wrap, all you need to do is unfold the cellophane roll and cut it to the length you need. Then simply wrap the product and secure it in place with tape, drawstring, or ribbon. Crystal Clear Cellophane wrap Add elegance and protection to your gifts, flowers, and crafts with Wrapyard’s high quality crystal clear cellophane wrap . Whether you're wrapping a bouquet, a gift basket, or party favors, this durable and glossy wrap elevates your presentation with a clean, polished finish. Designed to resist tearing and clouding, it’s perfect for birthdays, weddings, holidays, and more. Extra-thick for a professional look Crystal clear transparency Ideal for gifts, hampers, crafts & florals Easy to cut and fold Moisture and dust resistant
